note: Design guidelines are subjective assessments, not hard pass/fail

results.note: ✓ Fillet applied (8mm). ✓ Convex hull used for board outline. ✓ Thumb bridge shapes defined (connects thumb to main body). ✓ Generous fillet (8mm ≥ 8mm) — smooth corners

✓ Shadow casting enabled on meshes. ✓ Anti-aliasing enabled. ✓ Tone mapping active (ACES Filmic). ✓ PBR materials (MeshStandardMaterial with roughness/metalness). ✓ High metalness on chrome parts (reflective). ✓ Smooth camera damping (professional feel)

✓ generateWoodTexture function present. ✓ Warm bamboo color tones. ✓ Grain line pattern (400 wobble lines). ✓ Growth rings (6 curved arcs). ✓ Node bands (2-3 horizontal gradient bands). ✓ Normal map for surface relief. ✓ Roughness map for texture variation
✓ Board outline has fillet (rounded corners). ✓ Frame outline has fillet. ✓ Thumb bridge has fillet. ✓ Convex hull ensures smooth silhouette. ✓ S02 verified: fillet ≥ 8mm in defaults.yaml

✓ S09 verified: total stack = 4.8mm (1.0+0.5+1.6+0.5+1.2). ✓ Cherry MX ULP (ultra-low-profile) switches minimize height. ✓ 2mm bamboo plywood (thin viable thickness). ✓ 0.5mm cork gaskets (minimal dampening layer)

✓ Quick-release clevis pins (one-handed press-button). ✓ Single-step cable release documented in assembly. ✓ Elastic bands eliminate turnbuckle adjustment on fold/unfold. ✓ Cable detach: 2 button presses total (one per cable)
✓ Fold up to 160° (near-flat close). ✓ Inward fold (keycaps face each other — compact). ✓ Magnets hold halves closed. ✓ Cables wrap around closed keyboard (like diary rope)
✓ Cork gaskets present (acoustic dampening). ✓ Two cork layers (upper + lower) — full sandwich dampening. ✓ Layer stack precisely defined (no air gaps). ✓ Bamboo frame (natural dampening material)

✓ generateWoodTexture produces bamboo appearance. ✓ Normal map provides surface relief (grain visible). ✓ Zero metalness on wood (not plastic/metallic). ✓ Roughness = 0.4 (appropriate for wood). ✓ Tonal variation in wood texture
